creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: It seems makefs-generated ZFS images by skipping some optional dataset structures activate code not used since before ancient zpool version 11 and missing some locks.  I think https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/pull/16162 should fix the problem.  Though I wonder whether/when ZFS will regenerate those structures without explicit upgrade from the pre-11 pool version or will forever use the old code.
